description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The handguard is ribbed and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, providing multiple mounting points for accessories. The upper receiver is equipped with a flat-top rail, supporting flip-up iron sights for aiming. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling, and the trigger guard is slightly enlarged. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a standard muzzle device. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for both urban and tactical environments.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, detachable magazine, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, ribbed handguard, and the alignment of the sights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full-length handguard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, buffer tube, and the symmetry of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and the overall profile of the rifle.
